title: Senior Teacher - Delhi University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Delhi University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Delhi University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Delhi University:
Delhi University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University!
